message:
feat: add 12 norm conformance tests + fix vector_norm axis bug

- Add 12 conformance test cases for vector_norm and matrix_norm
  (L2, L1, L-inf, L0, L3, -inf, axis reduction, keepdims, fro)
- Fix bug in vector_norm axis calculation: incorrect index formula
  caused second row to produce 0.0 instead of computing actual norm
- Add ord_float, ord_str, ord_inf, axis, keepdims fields to
  SignalDifferentialCase struct for norm testing
- Include IO improvements: empty NPZ handling, structured payload
  validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
